query: MRI-guided prostate brachytherapy vs TRUS CT dosimetry evidence 2023 2024
citations: [Microultrasonography-Guided vs MRI-Guided Biopsy for Prostate Cancer Diagnosis: The OPTIMUM Randomized Clinical Trial.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/40121537/)
[MRI-GUIDED RADIOTHERAPY FOR PROSTATE CANCER: A NEW PARADIGM.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/36938552/)
[MRI-guided Minimally Invasive Focal Therapies for Prostate Cancer.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38051187/)
[MRI-Guided Radiotherapy for Prostate Cancer: Seeing is Believing.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/38105093/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 40121537. 2025/05/20 00:00. OBJECTIVE: To compare microultrasonography-guided and MRI fusion-guided biopsy.
DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: A multicenter, international, open-label, 
ran
evidence.source_title: Microultrasonography-Guided vs MRI-Guided Biopsy for Prostate Cancer Diagnosis: The OPTIMUM Randomized Clinical Trial.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 40121537. 2025/05/20 00:00. OBJECTIVE: To compare microultrasonography-guided and MRI fusion-guided biopsy.
DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: A multicenter, international, open-label, 
randomized, noninferiority trial of biopsy-naive men from 20 centers (8 
countries) with clinical suspicion of prostate cancer (elevated 
prostate-specific antigen [PSA] and/or abnormal digital rectal examination 
findings) from December 2021 to September 2024.
INTERVENTIONS: Participants were assigned
